page_title: Corporate Culture & Social Responsibility - MyuTech MicroMyu

hero.title: Social Responsibility
hero.sub: Empowering society through technology — the 'AI+' strategy driving sustainable growth
hero.mission: MyuTech deeply understands the social responsibilities of a technology company. We are committed to applying artificial intelligence in scientific research, industrial upgrading, public welfare, and social governance, promoting sustainable development and global cooperation to make technology truly benefit humanity.

science.title: "AI+" Science & Technology
science.description: Accelerate scientific discovery: use AI algorithms to speed up drug development, gene analysis, and materials research — reducing R&D cycles and costs.
bullets: Support universities and research institutes in AI-assisted studies
Open core technology platforms to empower researchers
Publish academic papers to promote innovation and knowledge sharing
Establish industry–academia–research alliances for technology transfer

industry.title: "AI+" Industrial Development
industry.description: Drive industrial intelligence: empower manufacturing, logistics, and energy sectors with AI to improve efficiency and competitiveness.
bullets: Smart manufacturing: predictive maintenance reduces downtime by 40%+
Smart logistics: optimize routes and reduce carbon emissions
Energy management: AI-driven scheduling improves energy efficiency
Empowering SMEs with affordable intelligent solutions

consumer.title: "AI+" Consumer Experience
consumer.description: Enhance consumption quality: provide personalized and immersive experiences through AI and XR technologies.
bullets: Intelligent recommendation: AI-based personalized shopping experience
AR/VR shopping: virtual try-on and home preview experiences
Smart customer service: 24/7 multilingual AI support
Quality assurance: AI visual inspection ensures product reliability

wellbeing.title: "AI+" Public Well-being
wellbeing.description: Improve people's livelihood: apply AI to healthcare, education, and elderly care to enhance public services.
bullets: Smart healthcare: AI image diagnosis improves early detection rates
Smart education: personalized learning platforms promote equality
Smart elderly care: IoT health monitoring supports senior living
Accessibility: speech and image recognition help people with disabilities

impact.label: benefit from our public welfare projects

governance.title: "AI+" Governance Capability
governance.description: Enhance modern governance: help governments and enterprises achieve intelligent decision-making and refined management.
bullets: Smart cities: traffic optimization, environment monitoring, and safety alerts
Emergency management: AI-based disaster prediction and rapid response
Data governance: transparent and auditable data systems
E-government: one-stop intelligent administration services

global.title: "AI+" Global Collaboration
global.description: Collaborate globally for the future: actively engage in international cooperation for responsible AI development and global sharing.
bullets: AI ethics and safety: participation in international standard-setting
Cross-border projects with global tech companies and research institutes
Technology aid for developing countries
Open-source contributions to share innovation results

sustainability.title: Commitment to Sustainability
sustainability.text: MyuTech integrates sustainability into corporate strategy and daily operations. We commit to technological innovation while focusing on environmental protection, energy efficiency, and social equity — achieving balance among economic benefit, social responsibility, and environmental care.

green_computing.title: Green Computing
green_computing.text: Optimize algorithm efficiency, reduce energy consumption, and promote carbon-neutral data centers

privacy.title: Data Privacy
privacy.text: Strictly comply with data protection laws to safeguard user privacy and data security

ethics.title: AI Ethics
ethics.text: Develop transparent and fair AI systems to avoid algorithmic bias and discrimination

community.title: Community Engagement
community.text: Support public welfare initiatives and contribute to community development
